Personal Loan

  • Documents Required
  • Tracking
  • EMI Calculator
  • Procedure and Eligibility
  • Interest Rate
  • Credit Score

A personal loan can be availed when an individual has an immediate requirement of funds, with minimal documentation, processing time with immediate disbursal to Customer bank account. It serves as a great option for individual for meeting their immediate financial requirements.

We, at Muthoot Finance, understand our customers and provide them with the perfect solutions for their requirements. One can apply for a personal loan online as well for enhanced ease. Get in touch with us to know your instant personal loan eligibility & other terms and conditions.

Personal loan EMI calculator

Personal loans offer an easy way for individuals when they want to finance a long-term goal. An important aspect that an individual should consider before availing a personal loan is the EMI that they will be liable to pay.


If you want to avail a personal loan from Muthoot Finance, you can use our personal loan EMI calculator to easily calculate the EMI you will have to pay even before you apply for your personal loan online. All you need to do is enter details such as the loan amount and loan tenure to calculate the monthly loan EMI.

What is a personal loan?

A personal loan comes in handy when you have an immediate financial requirement with minimum turnaround time& it is also known as an ‘all-purpose loan’. Unlike other secured loan products a personal loan has easy eligibility criteria & documentation. Today, one can avail instant personal loans to fulfil their personal needs.

How to Get An Instant Personal Loan Online?

To get an instant personal loan online, you need to submit the required documents along with your application. The lender will verify and approve your request. Once approved, the loan amount is credited to your bank account. To complete the process, submit an online or instamt personal loan application through the lender’s platform. You must then repay the loan through EMIs (Equated Monthly Instalments) over the selected repayment tenure.

A personal loan, if used judiciously, can also prove to be advantageous for improving your credit score.

Apply Now

Why Choose an Easy Personal Loan?

An easy personal loan can help you take care of various financial needs in a convenient manner. Major expenses can come up at any time without warning and could drain your savings. In such situations, opting for a personal loan can be very helpful. Some of the common reasons for applying for a personal loan can include financing a festive celebration, constructing a house, fixing a car, etc.

In addition, a personal loan can also aid you in meeting any shortfall experienced in purchasing a car or house, or in cases of medical contingencies, or for the higher education of your children, among other things. Going for a personal loan offers the easiest way to raise funds to make all your future plans come true, that too in a quick manner.

Let’s explore some of the other reasons why one can opt for a personal loan:

  • Debt Consolidation: It aids you in consolidating your expenses as you can pay off your credit card bills or other debts on time.
  • Flexibility of Use: you have the flexibility to use the loan for any expense
  • Quick Approval: At the time of securing a personal loan, minimum documentation is required, which results in quicker processing.
  • Reasonable Interest Rates: Another reason to go for personal loans is that they are available at reasonable interest rates.

All in all, numerous people are opting for instant personal loans today for many different reasons and you can avail one too if you have a personal need to take care of.

Factors That Affect Personal Loan Eligibility

Before you apply for a personal loan online, you should know about the different factors that impact your eligibility for a personal loan. These include:

  • Geographic location: The area where you live plays an important role in determining your eligibility for a personal loan.
  • Existing credit: If you are already repaying other loans your eligibility for a new loan will be affected.
  • Housing situation: If you live in your own house, you have an increased chance of getting your personal loan application approved. This is because if you reside in a rental house, it reduces your disposable income, which will lead to lower eligibility of Personal loan.
  • Income: The higher a person’s income, the higher is the loan amount they are eligible for. So, it may be said that your personal loan eligibility also depends on your income.
  • Organisation: Another determining factor in your personal loan eligibility is the company for which you work. Working for a well-known company that holds a good reputation in the market ensures that you have a stable job.
  • Credit history: Your credit history and credit score have the largest impact on your personal loan eligibility. The tenure, the interest rate, and the total loan amount that you can borrow will depend on this.

If individuals want to improve their eligibility for personal loans, they should pay their loan EMIs and credit card dues on time and in full, decrease their existing debt, minimising credit utilization, and so on.

Factors That Impact Interest Rates On Personal Loans

Another thing that you should be aware of before you apply for a personal loan online is the interest rate and the factors that affect it.

  • Income : At the time of deciding the interest rate, loan providers consider the income of the applicant. People with high income may be offered a lower interest rate. Individuals with lower annual incomes, on the other hand, may have to pay an interest rate that is higher.
  • Nature of the employment: Interest rates offered may differ on the basis of whether the applicant is Salaried profile with regular employment.
  • Employer details: There is an increased chance of a financial institution offering you a lower rate of interest if you work at a reputed organization.

How to Get Low Interest Personal Loans?

When you are about to apply for a personal loan online, there are certain tips that can prove to be helpful in availing a lower rate of interest. Some of these tips include:

  • Improve Your Credit Score: A high credit score denotes that an individual is creditworthy. A lender will offer lower personal loan interest rates to an applicant with a high credit score. So, before you apply for a personal loan online, you should check your credit score.
  • Do Not Miss Repayments: If you miss a credit card or a loan repayment, your credit score gets affected in an adverse manner. Loan providers generally consider your repayment history before deciding the interest rate for a personal loan. Individuals who have paid their past EMIs as well as credit card bills on time are more likely to be charged a lower interest rate.
  • Look out for offers: During festive occasions, financial institutions generally offer special interest rates for a limited period of time. You may be offered a lower interest rate if you apply for a loan when such offers are available.

Suggested Read: 8 Personal Loan Hacks to Save Big!

Apply Now

Things to Know Before Applying For An Instant Personal Loan

Some important points to consider before apply instant personal loan are:

  • Analyse the necessity of loan: The purpose of taking personal loans or any other loan for that matter is generally to meet immediate financial needs. So, if you can handle your financial situation without availing the loan, you must restrain from getting it.
  • Penalty Charges: If you don’t pay your EMIs/dues on time, a high penalty will be charged.
  • Borrow within your means: When you apply for an instant personal loan, ensure you borrow within your repayment capacity. An individual should opt for a personal loan carefully after conducting thorough research. You should also understand both the benefits and costs involved before availing an instant personal loan.

What documentation is required at Muthoot Finance for a personal loan ?

Latest salary slip, salary credit bank statement & KYC documents are required to be submitted for salaried individuals for applying for a personal loan from Muthoot Finance. You will also be required to submit additional documents as decided by the sanctioning authority. You can read more about the documentation that is required for availing a personal loan by Muthoot Finance in our Loan Policy.

A collateral-free instant personal loan online for salaried individuals and self-employed individuals is sanctioned after documentation and verification to assess the credit worthiness, local standing, integrity, and repayment capacity of the borrower. Apart from this, individuals who can provide collateral in the form of any tangible security, like LIC policies, RBI bonds, or NSCs, and existing Muthoot finance customers with an excellent track record can also apply for a personal loan without salary slip submission.

Why take a personal loan from Muthoot Finance?

Do you need immediate funds to deal with your financial needs? We, at Muthoot Finance, understand our customers and their various needs and provide the right solutions. Fulfil all your plans such as travelling, or invest in your kid’s higher education, or plan an upcoming wedding by availing a personal loan from Muthoot Finance. We offer loans that allow you to meet all kinds of personal needs. At Muthoot Finance, you can easily apply for a personal loan online.

When it comes to availing a personal loan from Muthoot Finance, you enjoy a variety of benefits as well. These include access to a loan that requires no collateral and minimum documentation. We offer personal loans at affordable interest rates and with quick processing. Other highlights of our service include flexible repayment options with multiple tenures.

Individuals can avail a personal loan through a simple and easy process from Muthoot Finance, repayable as EMI for a maximum tenure of sixty months. If you are looking for an instant loan online, Muthoot Finance offers quick and hassle-free approval for unsecured loans, helping you meet any financial requirement with ease. We have the best offers for you, ensuring a seamless borrowing experience.

Apply Now

Top Uses for a Personal Loan: How It Can Help You

There are no restrictions on the end use of the funds availed under a personal loan without collateral. An online personal loan can be used for several purposes, including:

  • Medical Expenses: Personal loans can help you meet unexpected medical bills.
  • Wedding Expenses: Weddings are generally a grand affair in India, which requires adequate finances. An online personal loan can also be used to finance a wedding.
  • Debt Consolidation: Make financial commitments easy with personal loans by consolidating multiple high-interest debt, like credit card repayments, under a relatively low-interest personal loan.
  • Vacations: Financial restraints should not stop you from taking a well-deserved break to travel. A personal loan can help you finance your vacation plans.
  • Home Improvements or Renovation: You can apply for a personal loan online in situations where the actual costs of the project exceed your budget.
  • Kids’ Education: Education is quite expensive today. But with easy personal loans, you can significantly reduce the financial strain.
  • Improving Your Credit Score: Taking a personal loan, whether it is for debt consolidation or for maintaining a healthy debt-to-income ratio, along with making timely repayments improves your credit score over time.

Tips to Increase your Chances of Getting a Personal Loan

There are several measures that you can take to improve your chances of getting an unsecured personal loan.

  • Use a personal loan calculator to understand your personal loan eligibility, so you can apply for the right loan amount.
  • Improve your credit score.
  • Avoid making multiple personal loan applications.
  • Check the eligibility criteria for a personal loan as set by the lender.
  • Put in due research for choosing the right personal loan provider.
  • Pay off some of your existing debts to ensure a healthy debt-to-income ratio.
  • Improve your eligibility for availing yourself of a personal loan without collateral by applying with a co-applicant.
  • Ensure income and job stability before applying for a personal loan.

Personal Loan FAQs

When can I opt for a Personal Loan from Muthoot Finance ?

There is no fixed time as to when you can apply for personal loans as they are essentially multi-purpose loans. Whenever you have a requirement, you can opt for a personal loan from Muthoot Finance. Some of the common reasons for which people apply for personal loans include finance weddings, renovate or build a house, expand their business, and for a medical emergency, among others.

How can I make repayment towards my EMI & other charges ?

Can I apply for a personal loan jointly with my spouse?

How is the personal loan disbursed?

What is a personal loan, and how does it differ from other types of loans?

What are the differences between secured and unsecured personal loans?

Can the loan amount be increased after the personal loan is sanctioned?
